narration: Here's something wild — the less money you have, the worse your brain gets at managing it. Scientists call it the scarcity mindset tax, and it's measurable.
visual: Dark background. Brain SVG split in half: left side glowing amber labeled 'NORMAL', right side dimmed red labeled 'SCARCITY MODE'. Title: 'YOUR BRAIN ON BROKE' springs in from below.

narration: Harvard researchers found that financial stress drops your effective IQ by 13 points. That's like functioning on zero sleep — every single day.
visual: Light background. IQ meter with needle animated from 100 down to 87. Red stress bar rising beside it. Large text: '-13 IQ POINTS'. Dollar sign with downward arrow.

narration: Why? Your brain has limited bandwidth. When it's busy worrying about bills, there's less left for smart decisions. It's not laziness — it's biology.
visual: Dark background. Horizontal progress bar labeled 'MENTAL BANDWIDTH' being filled: 60% red 'BILL WORRY', 20% orange 'DAILY STRESS', 20% green 'SMART DECISIONS'. Animated fill.

narration: That drain costs real money — about $1,800 a year in worse decisions. Late fees, missed discounts, impulse buys you'd never make with a clear head.
visual: Light background. Piggy bank SVG with cracks, coins falling out. Three icons appear: clock (late fees), price tag (missed deals), shopping bag (impulse buys). '$1,800/YEAR' in red.

narration: And here's the trap: worse decisions mean tighter money, which creates more stress, which drains more bandwidth. It's a loop — not a character flaw.
visual: Dark background. Four-node circular loop diagram: 'FINANCIAL STRESS' → 'REDUCED BANDWIDTH' → 'WORSE DECISIONS' → 'MORE DEBT' → back to start. Each node pulses red in sequence.

narration: Breaking the loop isn't about willpower — it's about fewer decisions. Automate one bill payment today. Free up bandwidth. That's where the escape starts.
visual: Light background. Phone SVG with payment toggle switching ON. Green checkmark springs in. Text: 'AUTOMATE = FREE YOUR BRAIN'. Person silhouette with lightbulb above head glowing amber.
